description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image. Define a single job named master that runs in the default stage and executes the following shell commands in order: pip install -r requirements_test.txt --upgrade; coverage run --source=dj_auth runtests.py; coverage html -d public --title=dj_auth; coverage report -m. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, keep the artifact for 10 weeks, and only retain it when the job succeeds. Tag the job with docker.
